2606.12071.title: On the Limits of LLM-as-Judge for Scientific Novelty Assessment
2606.12071.paper_summary: LLMs are increasingly used to generate and judge scientific ideas. This makes novelty evaluation a central problem. Full idea evaluation is difficult because it often requires judging a method, its feasibility, and its empirical promise. We therefore study a cleaner upstream object: the research question (RQ). RQ generation is a prerequisite for scientific ideation, and RQs can be compared against questions pursued in real papers. We introduce RQ-Bench, a benchmark built from recent arXiv papers. For each paper, we reconstruct author-anchored RQs from its cited background, gaps, and contributions. These RQs are not the only valid questions for the same background. They are author-anchored reference points for testing novelty judgments. We evaluate model-generated RQs with standalone LLM judging, comparative LLM judging, and human expert evaluation. LLM judges consistently rate model-generated RQs as highly novel, producing a novelty mirage; in comparative evaluations, this preference becomes even stronger. Domain experts, however, reach the opposite conclusion and prefer the author-anchored reference questions. We further find that many generated RQs are narrow or source-bound, a dimension that LLM judges often miss unless explicitly tested. Overall, the contradictory novelty evaluations between LLM judges and human experts raise a serious concern about the reliability of using LLMs to assess the scientific novelty of research questions.
2606.12071.paper_summary_zh: LLMs 正在被越來越多地用來生成和評估科學想法。這使得新穎性評估成為一個核心問題。完整的想法評估是困難的，因為它通常需要評判一種方法、其可行性和其實證潛力。因此，我們研究一個更清晰的上游對象：研究問題 (RQ)。RQ 生成是科學構思的先決條件，並且 RQ 可以與實際論文中追求的問題進行比較。我們介紹 RQ-Bench，這是一個基於最近 arXiv 論文構建的基準。對於每篇論文，我們從其引用的背景、空白和貢獻中重建作者主導的 RQ。這些 RQ 不是同一背景下唯一有效的問題。它們是用於測試新穎性判斷的作者主導參考點。我們使用獨立的 LLM 評判、比較的 LLM 評判和人類專家評估來評估模型生成的 RQ。LLM 評判者一致地將模型生成的 RQ 評為高度新穎，產生了一種新穎的幻影；在比較評估中，這種偏好變得更加強烈。然而，領域專家得出的結論正好相反，並且更喜歡作者主導的參考問題。我們進一步發現，許多生成的 RQ 是狹窄或源限制的，這是一個 LLM 評判者通常會錯過的維度，除非明確測試。總體而言，LLM 評判者和人類專家之間矛盾的新穎性評估引發了對使用 LLM 評估研究問題科學新穎性的可靠性的一個嚴重擔憂。
2606.12071.author: Soumitra Sinhahajari et.al.
2606.12071.authors: Soumitra Sinhahajari, Navonil Majumder, Soujanya Poria
